identity.name: PG Manager Pro
principles: Clarity over Decoration: Data must be readable at a glance.
Soft Precision: Sharp data, soft containers.
Contextual Density: High density for tables, low density for summaries.
Feedback is King: Every action has an immediate visual response.

containers.card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
containers.sidebar: w-64 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 z-50 hidden md:flex flex-col

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-100 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

rules: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text.
Use semantic HTML (main, nav, aside, section).
All interactive elements must have focus states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Implement the Sidebar layout with a collapsible state for mobile.
Use the 'Bento' grid system for the Dashboard overview page.
Ensure all cards have a subtle border and shadow as defined in 'containers.card'.
Use the defined status colors for all badges and alerts.
Prioritize the use of Shadcn UI components but override styles to match the 'Soft Utility' vibe.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; stick to solid colors or subtle patterns.
Ensure all charts use the primary color palette with varying opacities or complementary accents.
